rules.description: NDA must define 'Confidential Information' � a definition clause is mandatory.
rules.statutory_reference: Indian Contract Act 1872 � S.29 (certainty of terms)

rules.description: NDA must include standard exclusions (public domain, prior knowledge, independent development, legal disclosure) to be enforceable.
NDA must specify a confidentiality term or survival period.
NDA must identify the Disclosing Party and Receiving Party.
